sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77085" key="pammh=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παμ-μῆτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77085.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all-knowing, all-planning</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
